programme.desc: Brianna and Sam are ready to be parents, but her mother and stepfather are here to convince them that 18 is too young for parenthood. Later, Heather, Britney, and Taylor are all pregnant and claim that James is the father!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Curtis sat down with his mother Telisha, and told her that he is trying to have a baby but Telisha was shocked and terrified because Curtis is only 13 years old! Curtis insists he is ready to be a father.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Korey is positive that his girlfriend Dominique is cheating on him and is also worried that she might be selling sex. She says that his suspicions have caused him to become abusive. Then, Gregory thinks that his girlfriend Robin isn’t faithful!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Think He's Gay
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to live with them just because she’s the mother of his child.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Steve’s hosting another teen girl town hall to address critical issues all teen girls could face, including drug use, physical abuse, and online predators. No question is off-limits!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Devon slipped into a coma and is on life support. But before he fell into a coma, he told his mother that his ex Alisha said he did not father their son. Alisha denies ever saying this and feels his whole family has turned their backs on her.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sheroya is 17 and struggling to raise 2 kids while trying to party all the time. Her boyfriend Malcolm frequently cheats and verbally abuses her. Steve’s got a lot of work ahead with this couple, but will either of them wake up?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Sabrionna found many photos, videos, and messages from other women on her husband Anthony's phone. He claims she cheated with his best friend! Then, pregnant Andrea suspects Tim has been unfaithful because she found another woman's purse in his car!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Rey cheat on Ashley while she was pregnant with his baby and have a secret threesome behind her back? Plus, Jason is worried that his Uncle is paying his fiance to sleep with him. His Uncle has a shocking confession that you have to see!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I'll Prove You Are Cheating on My Teen!
programme.desc: Chris cheated and impregnated Lakin's neighbor. He denies he fathered Lakin’s baby. Then, John’s back for a 3rd DNA test. Can Jade prove that he’s the father or is her record 0-3?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Gerica met Skyler a year after Hurricane Katrina and is 100% sure that Skyler has to be the father of her son. Then, Sarah made the mistake of sleeping with 2 men years ago and thinks Johnny fathered her son! Who are the dads?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: 35-year old Lil Tia thinks her 24-year old boyfriend Antonio is cheating with her teen niece and daughter! Plus, Kim suspects her boyfriend Marcell of cheating and Laura thinks her boyfriend Tim is his cab for more than rides.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: William received a strange voicemail and became convinced that his girlfriend Jo was drugging him and sneaking men into their house to cheat. Plus, Donovan believes Lacara has been cheating, but she says she confessed so the accusations would stop!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show
programme.desc: Heather received a message from Alisha saying that she was pregnant with Remondo's baby but Remondo is Heather's boyfriend! Plus, Silvina and Clee'chaun have been in a relationship for almost 10 years and they've never met in person!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Lisa says she can't stand the constant meddling by her boyfriend's ex, Sarah. Next Deborah suspects that her long-time girlfriend has been cheating on her. Later, Angelina was pregnant when her husband had an affair.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: John está siendo infiel a su esposa Destinee con Cici, pero Cici también tiene algunos secretos. Entonces, Lala suelta un bombazo a su novio. Además, Michael y su esposa Tayliana tienen secretos que revelarse mutuamente.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Jaycee le demuestra a Brandy que nunca es correcto ser infiel y arruinar a una familia. Casi cree que su prometido podría aprender una lección de Kevin, un antiguo invitado. Además, concertamos una cita entre la espectadora Tamara y el invitado Nathan.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: ¡Anitra se entera de quién es realmente su pareja Kevin! Después, James está a semanas de casarse con Liz, pero tiene dos importantes secretos que contar. Después, Elliot dice que cometió el peor error de su vida al ser infiel a su novio, Rob.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: James está comprometido con Amanda, pero ahora confiesa lo de Melanie. Después, Jewel compite por el amor de su amante cuando Christa anuncia que lo quiere para ella.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer
programme.desc: Hope ha venido a enfrentarse a su mejor amiga, Laura, por robarle a su novio, Joey, y luego comprometerse con él. A continuación, John dirá que no tiene la culpa por acostarse con la mejor amiga de su novia.

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Epic flights, sea journeys, and road trips all play a key part in many species' lives. Animals travel in search of food, shelter, or a mate. But booking and organizing travel is no easy feat when those plans involve hundreds or thousands of individuals.

programme.title: Life In A Tide Pool

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Mexico: One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless

programme.title: Naked Science

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: From There to Here

programme.desc: Astronauts and Cosmonauts train and study for years to work and live aboard the International Space Station. With this wealth of experience and insight behind them what do they think when they return to Earth?

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: Sling Shot
programme.desc: Soviet Luna 3 was the first to use gravity to change course to photograph the dark side of the Moon. NASA Mariner 10 used the technique to swing by Venus to target Mercury. The gravity sling shot maneuver has become a standard for space navigation.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier
programme.desc: New satellites are being launched to continue detailed observations of Earth and its oceans and ice caps. They are finding that climate change is accelerating and they have the data to prove it.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow

programme.desc: Before spaceflight aviators began wearing pressure suits to allow them to function at higher ceilings.

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: River Monsters

programme.title: Black Gold

programme.desc: The new Misery Inc. catalogue is out, and Jimmy, thinking that the stuff is free, orders up every item. --- Jimmy and Beezy compete to snag the coveted hoof prints of Wrecken, their favourite soccer star.

programme.title: Jimmy Two Shoes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma recibe atención médica, todos piensan que sufre una crisis nerviosa, pero el doctor anuncia los resultados de sus análisis. Fernando estalla, los trámites del divorcio toman otro rumbo.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Eva tiene en sus manos una carta para Juan, Norma le pide que se la entregue para contarle por qué se aleja. Armando presenta a Pepita, la nueva cantante que despierta los celos de Rosario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara aconseja a Fernando, él sabe que ella conoce el secreto de su hermana. Óscar busca a Jimena en la casa de la montaña y ella lo provoca al llegar a una cascada, Norma los ve desnudos.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma le explica a Juan cuál es su decisión, ella no se resiste a besarlo. Él culpa a Óscar y le reclama su ambición cuando la boda de Jimena y Leandro está a punto de celebrarse.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo de Medina, quien sufre de catalepsia en secreto, deslumbra a Soledad de Obregón en un accidentando reencuentro, pero los padres de ella tienen un acuerdo con Alcides, su gemelo y rival.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad va a avisarle a Hugo que sus padres los han descubierto, justo cuando él tiene un ataque de catalepsia. Las circunstancias lo obligan a tomar una decisión sobre su relación.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Alcides hace planes en contra de su hermano con Arturo, pero son Soledad y su madre las víctimas de una trampa, cuando ella es obligada a irse a la casa de su tía Antonia.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Lucas cambia su opinión sobre Hugo y accede a que Soledad lo invite a su cumpleaños, pero tiene que tomar otras acciones al enterarse que está en juego la dignidad de su hija.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Lucas sale del coma y Verónica consigue que confiese ante un notario. Admite ser el responsable de varios crímenes y haber sido apuñalado por Macario. El principal sicario de Antonia huye de la policía. Gertrudis testifica contra Aníbal y lo hunde.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo llama al estrado a su arma secreta: Chacón. La audiencia ve como Aníbal y Antonia quedan al descubierto. David queda libre y disfruta del cariño de su mamá. De repente, Gabriela sufre un desmayo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le confiesa al Lagarto que ella es Gabriela Suárez. Alejandro le pide a Antonia que confiese todo y Ricardo le propone a Aníbal que declare contra Guerra, pero el exsenador tiene miedo. Antonia le propone un pacto inaceptable a Verónica.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Aníbal delata a Antonia, conmovido por la grabación que le mostró Verónica. Antonia le ofrece una gran suma a Macario para que asesine a Verónica. Alejandro le recuerda a Verónica que todavía la ama. Guerra intenta seducir a Rodrigo para salvarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma le explica a Juan cuál es su decisión, ella no se resiste a besarlo. Él culpa a Óscar y le reclama su ambición cuando la boda de Jimena y Leandro está a punto de celebrarse.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan está destrozado y abandona la construcción de la cabaña, Fernando está furioso. Óscar y Jimena se reconcilian, angustiados por el compromiso con Leandro, buscan una salida.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: With the $1 million dollar prize on the line, the final four teams race through France en route to the finish line in New York City, where they'll encounter a terrifying Houdini-inspired Roadblock.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Paint along with Nicholas Hankins as we explore an expansive view of a Bob Ross snow capped mountain.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In this brilliant southwestern scene, Bob Ross portrays a unique view of nature with clear blue skies, dry mountains, and a graceful river.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross paints an old weathered dwelling today, burrowed deep in the snow and lined with protective evergreens.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Travel deep into the forest with Bob Ross and discover the beauty and serenity of an elegant waterfall.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Find yourself in a place just like this on a warm summer day - Bob Ross creates clear sky and shade trees by a nice swimming spot.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: A partially blackened canvas is all you need to start creating this dark, mood-filled misty waterfall scene with artist Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Spend a half-hour with Bob Ross as he demonstrates the creation of the perfect brown-toned mountain scene - warm and wonderful!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross presents a really unique idea using black gesso -- two lovely paintings in one -- summer and winter scenes overlapping on the same canvas!

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross teaches us the secret of his wet-on-wet technique while creating a restless ocean crashing against a rugged rocky coastline.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross takes you to a lovely spot deep in the woods where the seclusion, silence, and beauty offer serenity to the soul.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Such magnificent power and vibrant color in the sea and sky! Watch Bob Ross as he tries to tame this beautiful ocean painting.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: In the golden glow of sunrise, join Bob Ross for a refreshing look at early morning where anglers work and thrive.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Cross a frozen stream under the shelter of a grand covered bridge and enjoy the tranquility of a beautiful Bob Ross winter's day.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Soft, serene and near silent, this Bob Ross painting is simple and elegant, with just a lone cabin nestled comfortably into pillows of snow.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Go on a real nature hike with Bob Ross - follow the overgrown path deep in the woods and enjoy the silent beauty of the surrounding stillness.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Nicholas Hankins makes sure the chill of autumn is felt creeping in on the banks of a winding creek.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Bob Ross employs some of his well-known oval magic to paint a lovely cabin scene situated in a serene, soft little rolling pasture.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross
programme.desc: Discover a beautiful quiet lake hidden deep in the wilderness - and just beyond a glorious snow-covered mountain! - from the magical brushes of Bob Ross.

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Joy of Painting with Bob Ross

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia is conflicted when she's presented with a career changing offer which carries a large financial risk. Meanwhile, Will and Diane face off against their creditors, and Jordan and Eli disagree over a possible attack on Maddie Hayward's campaign.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Office politics come to a head when Will and Diane ask Alicia and Cary to face off against them in a mock trial, only to get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When the Justice Department refuses to reveal who will be testifying against Eli, Elsbeth takes Assistant U.S. Attorney Josh Perrotti to civil court for defamation in order to force him to answer her questions under oath.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Jailed drug dealer Lemond Bishop requests that Alicia work with lawyer Charles Lester, but as witnesses against Bishop begin recanting their testimony, she begins to suspect that Lester's meek appearance isn't all it seems.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia and Will's latest case brings them to an inquest at the coroner's office, where they are hindered by a strict rule that limits their questioning to three per witness.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: When an erratic and litigious client is murdered, Alicia is convinced to waive attorney/client privilege to help the police when she learns that the killer may also be targeting someone close to her.

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Adrian and Diane serve as outside counsel for a broadcast network planning to air a controversial segment that would derail the career of a beloved star. Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: The Good Fight

programme.title: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Reddick, Boseman and Lockhart represent an African-American undercover cop, Rashid Clarkson, who was left crippled after being shot by another Chicago police officer in the line of duty.Series finale streaming only on Paramount+ on 9/8.

programme.title: The Good Wife
programme.desc: Alicia and Will go to trial unprepared when they learn that an impending Supreme Court ruling could result in Colin Sweeney being jailed for life. Also, Diane reunites with Kurt McVeigh but is forced to reevaluate the relationship.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Living Fossils
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets some of the most ancient species living on Earth. Red pandas, hoatzins, koalas, crocodiles and pelicans!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Meet creatures that couple up for keeps, like Magellanic penguins, West Africa’s Red River hogs, Chilean flamingos, golden lion tamarins and more. Love is in the air on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack for an unforgettable journey from Borneo to Kuala Lampur! See how conservation work on the front lines is protecting Malaysia's unique and diverse wildlife – like adorable orangutans, slithering snakes and two species of elephants!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Jungle Critters
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers creatures living in the deep, dark jungle. Elusive reptiles like pythons and caimans, river-dwellers like piranha and Amazonian manatees and massive primates like lowland gorillas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Top of the Class
programme.desc: It's back to school for Jungle Jack as he continues his animal education in all sorts of interesting ways. From ranger school in Africa, to farrier school in Florida, and even zoo school. You never know what you'll learn on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to Zimbabwe! Just around the corner from majestic Victoria Falls, the folks at Elephant Camp are working to provide a home to orphaned Elephants in need. Jack assists the team in radio collaring a soon-to-be-released female.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's epic adventure to the Serengeti unfolds with a once-in-a-lifetime look at the great migration of wildebeest and zebra. Then Jack encounters elephants, lions, and an African rock python and he pays a visit to a local school.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Saving species on the brink of extinction takes a lot of work, but for the conservationists at White Oak in North Florida, it's their passion. This world-renowned breeding and research center conserves endangered species one animal at a time.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Wet & Wild
programme.desc: Bring your towel along for today’s wet and wild adventure! From the biggest fish in the sea, the whale shark, to sea lions, sperm whales, tiger sharks, and more. Find out which is number one, as Jack becomes your guide to the mysteries of the deep!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads to Africa and the front lines of this growing threat to see what can be done to save the rhino from extinction. Jack meets the conservationists who are fighting back using every possible option.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Predator Alert
programme.desc: Aggressive carnivores sometimes seem like the bad guys of the animal kingdom, but top predators play an essential role: keeping nature in balance. Today, Jungle Jack is counting down nature’s supreme hunters, like lions, crocs, leopards and hyenas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Dirty Half-Dozen
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he uncovers some of the earthiest creatures in the world. Mud-loving elephants, nesting gators, burrowing penguins, sand-dwelling bee-eaters and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Extreme Destinations
programme.desc: From the mountain gorillas of the Impenetrable Forest, the Andean cat of the Atacama Desert, to the penguins of Antarctica, join Jungle Jack as he counts down the most extreme animal destinations on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he reveals how to tell the difference between some commonly confused creatures, like Cheetahs and Leopards, Crocs and Gators, Penguins and Puffins, Turtles and Tortoises and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Just outside the city of Santiago, Chile there are people working to conserve and protect their native wildlife. Join Jack as he meets up with a family who started out taking in abandoned pets and ended up running a rehab center for rescued primates.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Zootastic Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jack for a globetrotting adventure as he counts down seven zoo-tastic adventures from the Australia Zoo to his home base, the Columbus Zoo! See which zoo is number one on this Wild Countdown!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he heads to Pigeon Forge, Tennessee for an All-American Bald Eagle adventure with the American Eagle Foundation at Dollywood!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he meets the remarkable rescued residents of The Farm Sanctuary in California. Loveable cows, goats, pigs and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Helpers
programme.desc: Prepare to be amazed by seven true stories of some truly remarkable service animals on today’s Wild Countdown! From K-9 cops to dolphin detectives, we’re counting down seven remarkable animal super stars!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Whether they cross huge distances in a single leap like kangaroos, or gracefully soar above the waves like dolphins, or escape from predators like frogs, all of today’s countdown creatures are built to bounce, bound and jump around.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he braves the mighty Zambezi River in Zambia. Jack gets up and close and personal with the river's inhabitants on a kayaking adventure before heading off on a walking safari with lions and cheetahs.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack journeys to Nairobi where he and Sue learn to care for baby elephant orphans at a truly groundbreaking animal nursery. Then they come face to face with some of the country's tallest citizens – the endangered Rothschild giraffe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Akagera National Park in Rwanda, once devastated by poaching, to see its transformation and thriving populations of Hippos and Crocodiles and a homecoming for African Crowned Cranes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is back at the barnyard with six of his favorite farm animal friends, like pot-bellied pigs, horses, cows, and even camels!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is traveling across the globe to bring you his favorite zoo adventures! From Asia's Singapore Zoo to Healesville in Australia, Calgary Zoo in Canada, and Jack's home, see what it's like behind the scenes at some of the world's coolest zoos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today Jack is traveling to visit Terri, Bindi and Robert Irwin and see first-hand how Steve's dream turned into a reality as the Hanna family meets up with the Irwin family at the Australia Zoo. They see Sumatran tigers, elephants, and crocodiles!

programme.desc: Jamie cooks marinated squid salad, pot roasted pork and a fruit cobbler for fans of the music group ABBA.

programme.title: Jamie's Easy Meals for Every Day

programme.desc: When an elderly man's granddaughter falls for one of his fresh-faced friends, the man seeks out some of the youth potion for himself. Meanwhile, things start moving a little too fast for Isaac and the woman he's dating.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A sarcastic woman (Anne Meara) goes on a rampage when she finds out she's on a cruise with the same man she's suing (Jerry Stiller) for damages. Meanwhile, a famous professor meets a former student who is hired to replace his mentor/

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Stubing meets a gorgeous movie queen (Joan Collins), who recently shed her ninth husband, he is fascinated by her charm and beauty. Then, a man decides to prioritize golf over his wife, so the neglected woman decides to play ball with an old friend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When Stubing meets a gorgeous movie queen (Joan Collins), who recently shed her ninth husband, he is fascinated by her charm and beauty. Then, a man decides to prioritize golf over his wife, so the neglected woman decides to play ball with an old friend.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The captain's daughter is put in a tough situation she is accused of stealing supplements from Doc's office. Then, Gopher's uncle (Red Button) falls in love with the lady who runs the ship's gift shop.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The vivacious Hannah Harvye (Mary Martin) immediately becomes involved with the crew and rekindles a romance with an old flame. An unassuming man (Ben Murphy) finds himself in a tight situation with a maid he's never met. Gopher saves a man's life.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A jilted fiance hires a Mata Hari (Elaine Joyce) to find the crew member that ruined his wedding plans; a junior executive (Parker Stevenson) suffers in silence while his boss (David Doyle) lusts after his bride.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: A married couple finds out that their daughter is in love with the father's best friend, while a progressive woman agrees to help her romantic partner have an affair.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: When an organization wants to give a crew member an award, Captain Stubing suggests Isaac. Meanwhile, a fun-loving guy tries to help out his heartbroken friend but finds himself in trouble after meeting an unusual woman.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The professional escort of an older woman (Vera Miles) dallies with a young woman (Constance Forslund); an advertising whiz tries to impress his best client despite putdowns from her daughter.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An estranged mother and daughter mend their relationship after a secret about their past is revealed. Then, an attractive widow finds herself falling for a burly crew member.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An author (Tom Poston) is blackmailed by his secretary; a father and son (Geoffrey Scott, Clark Brandon) unwittingly fall for the same woman (Markie Post).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: An Army captain (Beth Howland) sets her sights on Gopher; a married couple (Charlotte Rae, Louis Nye) meet up with two swingers (Jamie Farr, Heather Locklear).

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Everyone is a suspect when a passenger goes missing about the Pacific Princess. Meanwhile, when Julie's high-school friend boards the ship with her son, they learn an important lesson after running into the woman's father and another passenger.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There are several things that can suggest murder; jealousy, anger, poison…When everyday substances reveal hidden clues that break a homicide case, those substances become the elements of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers hide or destroy the remains of their victims, it becomes the mission of forensic scientists to reconstruct the scenes and prove murder for an absent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Formed in the 1830s to protect settlers against Indian attack, the Rangers became part of the Texas Highway Patrol in 1935. Their role has continued to evolve to keep up with changing times; today it includes sophisticated forensics labs.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic scientists find clues written in blood as they investigate the deaths of three women killed by the men who once loved them.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In San Diego, California, a killer has left behind pieces of evidence. Detectives must sort through these small clues to prove murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark is injured in an accident, leaving his legs paralyzed. At the doctor's suggestion, Lucas and Mark set out on a trek to Mission Springs.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mario Arsatti claims to be an acquaintance of a good friend from Lucas' past. But it's pleasure before business. Mario has been hired to kill Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas, who blames his wife's death on his father-in-law, refuses to help the old man elude a gang of gunmen.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The lazy Jackman brother's mortgage has been foreclosed. Unfit for farming, they head to a nearby town. The family patriarch becomes marshal and deputizes his sons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his girlfriend discover that an old hermit is very lonely. Old Tony invites them to lunch and lets them look for arrowheads on a remote part of his land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark decide to enter a local turkey shoot to raise money to buy a ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Cattle baron Oat Jackford orders his two cowboys to run Lucas McCain and his son off their ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark gets caught on a mountain ledge, a young outlaw risks his life to rescue him and breaks his leg doing so.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The notorious Shelton rides into the town of North Fork to take revenge on an elderly Marshal who is now crippled and working for Lucas McCain.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Johnny Gibbs, Lucas McCain's brother-in-law, visits the McCain ranch. Gibbs, a rodeo rider wanted by the law, begins stirring up trouble.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A vengeful judge who believes Lucas was responsible for his son's death, kidnaps Mark McCain to revenge himself on Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome Italian count arrives in North Fork. The town bully ridicules his manner of speech and dress and provokes the Count to challenge him to a duel.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Someone stumbles upon a brand new society unlike anything seen before.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A deeper look at the Sanctuary and the world of the Saviors; members of Alexandria look for supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Negan's unwelcome visit to Alexandria continues as other members scavenge for supplies; things quickly spin out of control.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others are led to a new community, where they meet the residents and their ruler; a familiar face resurfaces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While searching for a missing Alexandrian, Rick and his group encounter a mysterious collective, its inhabitants unlike any they have come across.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: An Alexandrian discovers they must navigate the mysterious, confusing and terrifying world within the Saviors' compound.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group scavenges for supplies; back in Alexandria, someone must make a morally challenging decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Things do not go as planned when a group of Kingdommers delivers goods to the Saviors during a routine supply drop-off.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Saviors visit the Hilltop unexpectedly, surprising everyone, with plans of taking more than supplies.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group of Alexandrians embarks on a journey; one member of the group must make a heartbreaking decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The stakes continue to grow higher as paths cross; the group enacts an intricate plan.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and his group, along with the Kingdom and Hilltop, have banded together to bring the fight to Negan and the Saviors.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The plan involving Alexandrians, Kingdommers and Hilltoppers unfolds; as Rick continues to fight, he encounters a familiar face.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Conflict with the Saviors leads to unintended consequences for the Hilltop, the Kingdom, and Alexandria; morality proves tricky in wartime.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En secreto, el Gobernador y sus hombres preparan una incursión mortal contra la prisión. Darryl y Merle lleguen en mitad de la contienda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador permite a Andrea, acompañada de Milton, ir a la prisión a negociar la paz con su antiguo grupo. Mientras, Tyreese y Sasha llegan a Woodbury y le ofrecen al Gobernador información sobre la prisión a cambio de poder quedarse allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Michonne y Carl viajan al condado de Rick en busca de armamento y encuentran a alguien a quien creían muerto. Durante la misión, Rick cambia la percepción que tiene de Michonne.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea concierta un encuentro entre Rick y el Gobernador para que negocien la paz, pero el Gobernador exige la cabeza de Michonne a cambio del alto el fuego.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea descubre la verdad sobre el Gobernador e intenta huir para alertar al grupo de Rick, pero el Gobernador envía a sus hombres en su busca. Entretanto, alguien ha provocado un sabotaje en Woodbury y los sospechosos son Tyreese y Milton.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick duda entre entregarle o no a Michonne al Gobernador y poner así fin a la contienda. Sin embargo, Merle se anticipa a las órdenes de Rick y decide tomar una decisión por su propia cuenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador y sus hombres lanzan un ataque contra la prisión, pero el grupo de Rick se defiende. Al final de la contienda, solo una de las dos comunidades podrá seguir existiendo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los supervivientes de Woodbury se han unido al grupo de Rick en la prisión, crían animales, cultivan y todo parece ir bien. Sin embargo, el grupo va a descubrir que el peligro no siempre llega desde afuera.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick establece una cuarentena para evitar que el virus se propague entre la población de la cárcel. Tyreese descubre que alguien ha asesinado y quemado los cadáveres de su novia y su amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl encabeza un grupo que sale de la cárcel en busca de medicamentos y, durante el trayecto, oyen por radio que alguien habla de un santuario. Rick averigua quién asesinó a Karen y David y por qué lo hizo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Carol salen en busca de comida y ocurre algo que cambia su relación para siempre. Mientras, el otro grupo sigue buscando medicinas y, durante la misión, Bob le confiesa a Tyreese que es alcohólico.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La salud de los enfermos empeora drásticamente aunque Hershel trate de salvar sus vidas como pueda. Rick revela a Maggie qué ha pasado con Carol, mientras que en las murallas de la prisión una muchedumbre de zombis amenaza con destruir la valla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Tras la caída de Woodbury, el Gobernador vaga sin rumbo hasta que encuentra a una familia cuyo patriarca está moribundo. El Gobernador se encariña especialmente con Lilly, una niña autista a la que promete proteger siempre.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador se da cuenta de que el grupo de Martínez es débil, a pesar de que tienen un gran arsenal. Además, localiza a quienes le arrebataron todo lo que tenía.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador captura a Hershel y Michonne y exige al grupo salir de la prisión. Sin embargo, Rick y su gente no van a dejarse vencer sin presentar batalla.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri falls for Jack when he buys a mustache which makes him look like her old boyfriend.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A former cook in the Navy with Jack comes to town to con his way into a partnership in Jack's Bistro.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls fake a contest to give Jack the rent money he needs for Jack's Bistro. Their good deed turns to disaster when Jack spends the money on a leather coat.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Cheryl asks Jack to father her child, but Jack refuses. Janet thinks Cheryl wants to marry Jack because she's going to have his baby, so she talks Jack into complying with Cheryl's wishes. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry discovers an answered magazine quiz and he and Jack think one of the girls wants to have an affair with Jack. They take the girls on a weekend trip to find out who answered the quiz so Jack can talk her out of it.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack receives $1,000 by mistake from an automated cash machine. He hides it in the couch for the weekend but when the Bank Security arrives to collect the money, it is nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack writes a nasty letter to a famous food critic, thinking the critic is going to give his bistro a ruinous review. When the critic assures Jack the review will be favorable, Jack tries to retrieve the letter from the critic's desk.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack is dating a sex therapist who has asked him to keep her job a secret. Janet, concluding she is a prostitute, is nasty to her and no one can understand why - especially when Janet's own father has become so friendly with her.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack has two dates, so he talks Larry into posing as him and spending the day with his unwanted date, Janet's childhood friend, who is visiting from out of town.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack believes he has won a baking contest that is open only to women. Disguised as "Grandma Tripper," he goes to collect the check and learns that he is a finalist and must bake his cookies for the company's executives to win the prize.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack's father visits unexpectedly and resumes his good nature meddling. Jack explodes and tells him to stay out of his life, but when he learns his father has lost his job, Jack gives him the opportunity to be useful.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Terri is up for a promotion and tells Dr. Kenderson she is married to ward off his advances. When he invites himself and his wife over for dinner, Jack poses as Terri's husband while Janet and Larry pose as French-speaking house guests.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: When Jack attends a charity ball with a socialite and loses $15,000 gambling, Larry and the girls attempt to help him recover the money.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The girls flip over a handsome Englishman who moves in next door, but Jack and Furley become convinced that he is one of London's most sought after criminals.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Janet is thrilled with her new job as an aerobics teacher, and her new boss Tina is thrilled with Jack. When Tina blackmails Jack into being at her beck and call, Larry offers to take her off Jack's hands.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an old flame at the park who is seeking advice about her jealous husband. Furley joins them, and they all get poison oak. Later, at Jack's house, Furley tells the husband they were all in the bushes together.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Furley get locked in a freezer together. Convinced they are going to die, they have a heart-to-heart talk, and Jack confesses that he really isn't gay. Once safe, Jack worries because Furley knows the truth about him.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio plants a stray cat at Furley's door, hoping he'll bend his rules and keep it. When a girl appears looking for her kitten, Furley lies and says he took it to the pound; so Jack and the girls search the pounds and bring home three different cats.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: After a night on the town with his old navy buddies, Jack discovers he has a tattoo on his derriere. When Jack goes to the hospital to have it removed, Janet thinks he is having a vasectomy and Furley thinks he is having a sex change.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack offers to model for a beautiful art teacher and finds himself nude in front of her classroom when Furley walks in. Jack begs Furley not to tell, but the secret is out when a nude portrait of Jack appears at the Regal Beagle.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack borrows Janet's new car to drive a gorgeous model to a photo session and totals the car on the way home. He pretends to have amnesia in the hospital, but Janet gets suspicious and concocts a plan to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A customer of the flower shop names Janet in his will, and she receives a vase. His nephew, Philip, an art collector, visits Janet, and Jack thinks he lied about the value of the vase and is trying to get it back.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack meets an attractive stewardess, Vicky Bradford; but between her father and her dates, she doesn't seem to have time for Jack. Janet announces her engagement to Philip, while Jack is jealous and lovesick.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack thinks Vicky wants a job in Houston and encourages her, causing her to think he wants to end their relationship. She interrupts Janet's wedding to find out why. They make up and the ceremony resumes. Jack proposes and is stunned by Vicky's refusal.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Vicky explains that she is afraid of marriage and suggests to Jack that they live together. Jack reluctantly agrees. They are toasting their first night together in their new apartment when they are interrupted by Mr. Bradford.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: In order to convince their landlord, Mr. Roper, that there is nothing going on between them and their new male roommate, Chrissy and Janet tell him that Jack is gay.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Chrissy's visiting mother, not knowing that the girls have rented the spare room to Jack, causes havoc when she decides to spend the night with them.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Floyd Patterson 2
programme.desc: On September 20th, 1972 Muhammad Ali faced Floyd Patterson for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York that ended in the seventh round due to swelling and cuts on Pattersons eye giving the victory to Ali.

programme.title: James Toney vs Michael Nunn
programme.desc: On May 10th, 1991 James Toney fought Michael Nunn at the John O'Donnell Stadium in Davenport for IBF World middleweight titles with the bout ending in round 11 by technical knockout victory for Toney.

programme.title: Iran Barkley vs Thomas Hearns 1
programme.desc: On June 6th, 1988 Iran Barkley faces Thomas Hearns for the first time at the Las Vegas Hilton Center they battle for the WBC World Middleweight title with the bout lasting 3 rounds resulting in a victory for Barkley.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ivan Robinson
programme.desc: On May 28th, 2005 Julio Cesar Chavez and Ivan Robinson faced eachother at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in an unamimous decision victory for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs. Joe Frazier 2
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1974 Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier face eachother for a second time at Madison Square Garden in New York for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles resulting in a strong win for Ali.

programme.title: Sugar Ray Leonard vs Davey Boy Green
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Sugar Ray Leonard fought Davey Boy Green for the WBC World Welterweight titles at the Capitol Center in Landover in a bout that went 4 out of 15 rounds ending with a knockout victory for Leonard.

programme.title: Best of George Foreman
programme.desc: All the best fight moments of boxer and entrepreneur "Big" George Foreman.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera
programme.desc: On February 19th, 2000 Erik Morales fought Marco Antonio Barrera for WBC and WBO World Super Bantamweight titles at Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas which ended in a split decision victory for Morales.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Maros Antonio Barrera III
programme.desc: On November 27th, 2004 Erik Morales and Marco Antonio Barrera faced eachother for the third and final time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 1
programme.desc: On December 13th, 1991 James Toney and Mike McCallum fought eachother for the first time at the Convention Hall in Atlantic City for IBF World Middleweight title ending in a draw.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 2
programme.desc: On August 29th, 1992, James Toney rematched Mike McCallum for the IBF Middleweight Title in Reno. This time, Toney came out on top via a majority decision in which many believed the scorecards were too lopsided in favor of Toney.

programme.title: James Toney vs Mike McCallum 3
programme.desc: On February 22nd, 1997 James Toney and Mike McCallum face each other for the final time at the Mohegan Sun Casino in Uncasville in a strong bout that lasted 12 rounds ending in a victory for Toney.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four are incensed to find out that because of their constant attacks on The Mother Truckers, David McLane has granted Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag a Main Event tag team match against Penelope Pink and Vickie Lynn McCoy.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal have a new look, but it's make or break for The All American Girls as they call their shot against them for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The VIP Abilene Maverick is firmly in The Beast's crosshairs as The Beast finally gets the rematch she's been waiting on for weeks, and a chance to reclaim the WOW World Championship that she never lost.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast demands justice after taking a loss in the WOW World Championship Match in the last episode of WOW.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.desc: After the truth about Abilene Maverick's injury is revealed, David McLane reminds her of her obligation to defend The WOW World Championship Title.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abilene Maverick makes a special announcement that shakes the WOW roster to its core before The Beast wrestles "Best In Show" breed competition champion, Goldie Collins.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Miami's Sweet Heat: Laurie and Lindsey demand a title shot and call out The Mother Truckers to defend their gold in the Main Event. Ariel Sky fights for a way back into Coach Campanelli's good graces, but will Ariel's status as a wrestler be revoked?

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A decidedly different and dangerous assignment awaits Josh when he agrees to go into the Apache camp and compete in their contests to win the hand of a woman.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Pursuing killer Joe Collins into the Superstition Mountains, Josh is followed by a man who believes Collins could be his long-lost son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A blindly obedient religious cult cast lots and it falls upon a young woman to act as its angel of vengeance.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh receives a letter from a girl at the St.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A concerned father hires Josh to retrieve his son, a passionate young ideologue whose gift for rousing rhetoric is being used by plunderers to recruit freedom fighters.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh's big talk after a dog is shot lands him in big trouble when his browbeating the locals in the saloon about ending the decades-long Carter-Blake feud.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: To track down the cheating tinhorn gambler Johnny Deuce and recover his money, Randall befriends the card sharp's protégé, a 12-year-old orphan boy and card cheat, nicknamed The Montana Kid.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh embarks on a mission of mercy when he pleads with the parents of a boy with appendicitis to let the doctor operate.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly accepts an offbeat assignment: finding a beautiful bride for his bashful buddy Charlie, the homeliest and loneliest man in the West.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: The government employs Randall to portray an escaped prisoner in order to trick his cellmate into leading authorities to the $50,000 he stole and stashed away in a secret location.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall finds his prey in the hands of a lynch mob wiping out his bounty.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Who needs enemies with friends like the residents of Rogue City, who celebrate Randall for bringing in notorious killer Jumbo Kane.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Randall is rooked out of his bounty by crafty criminal Hunt Willis and his accomplice.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Against better judgment after losing a quick draw contest and bet, Josh serves as a guide for a dandified East Coast gun salesman who comes west to retrieve and replace a defective gun he sold to notorious outlaw Curly Bill Brocius.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: On the trail of a Cavalry deserter and the horses he stole, Josh rides into a town ruled as the private fiefdom of its autocratic, psychopathic marshal who is holding the horses and deserter.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Hired by a father to bring back the man who killed his son Josh is surprised when he doesn't get paid because he brought the man back alive.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh must bring a man back for murder.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of Kaiba Corporation trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game. Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can YUGI and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past a Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mailose all their life points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Duke Devlin defeats Joey and humiliates him in public, forcing Yugi to challenge Duke to a duel. However, this will not be a Duel Monsters duel, but a new game named Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: In exchange for Joey's freedom, Yugi agrees to give up Duel Monsters forever if he loses. Unfamiliar with the rules, Yugi gets off to a rough start.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi's position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Duke's all-powerful Orogoth The Relentless dices Yugi's entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze. Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed. Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Tea helps him uncover the mysteries of his past.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel. If he loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes Black Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey's Red-Eyes Black Dragon.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter's strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it's too late to stop him. The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey's next on his hit list. What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey's hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba's extrasensory perception was a hoax, that he's not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world's most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm. Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck. Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up as long as he believes in the heart of the cards.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To counter Arkana's Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: the Dark Magician Girl!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes. Will Weevil's royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik's nefarious Rare Hunters, the silent but deadly Strings.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters: the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The magic card Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts. If Joey wins, he'll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako's oceanic warrior, The Legendary Fisherman, unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey's monsters from the depths of the sea. Joey has to put his skills, training, and experience to the ultimate test before he's all washed out.
